hypothesis: HSM (learned state retrieval) + multi-skip x0 on 8xH100. Smoothest curve on 1xH100, stable training, healthy train-val gap. HSM's selective state retrieval may compound in value with 8x more training — more data means the state bank has richer snapshots to retrieve from. With ~2B tokens on 8xH100, expect significant improvement over the 255M token 1xH100 run.
